site.name: Open Health Data Portal
site.publisher: Ministry of Innovation and Digital Transformation

home.title: Open health data for Bulgaria
home.lead: Machine-readable, freely accessible and interoperable health datasets. Published as DCAT-AP, with independent disclosure control.
principles: Public repository from day 1 — transparency by default.
API-first: every dataset is available programmatically via a stable versioned API.
Disclosure control: small cells are suppressed to prevent re-identification.

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.lead: All published datasets. Select one for details, metadata and downloads.

docs.title: Technical documentation
docs.lead: How to use the API, the metadata profile and harvesting formats.

about.title: About the portal
about.lead: A joint inter-institutional open health data initiative, institutionally hosted by MIDT.

contact.title: Contact
contact.security: Security vulnerabilities are disclosed responsibly — see SECURITY.md, not a public issue.

footer.license: Content is available under open terms. The code is public.
